features.title: shadcn/ui init + financial pre-config + component library install（重写自原 template-clone）
features.acceptance: 在 workbench/frontend/ 上 (1) npx shadcn@latest init 保留现有 Footer/layout/middleware（B021 已交付不重写）；(2) selectively add 核心组件 Button/Card/Dialog/Toast/Tabs/Table/Sheet/Input/Select/Tooltip；(3) 金融预配置：Inter UI + JetBrains Mono numeric via next/font/google + tabular-nums on .numeric class + P&L tokens --color-up=#00c853 / --color-down=#ff3b30 + compact density (Tailwind padding/Button heights) + Zinc dark theme；(4) 装 AG Grid Community + TradingView lightweight-charts + ECharts；(5) npm run build clean + 无 peer-dep warning + B021 既有 Playwright disclaimer regression 全过；(6) 若 shadcn/Next 15/Tailwind v4 ecosystem 不兼容 fall back to Next 14 + Tailwind 3 + shadcn-for-tw3（已有）+ 文档化 fall-back 到 ADR addendum。详见 docs/specs/B022-workbench-phase1-spec.md §F001 + §Status §Cloud+auth+Repository adaptation。

features.title: OpenAPI ↔ TypeScript types pipeline 复用 + extend（B020 F004 已有）
features.acceptance: B020 F004 已交付 workbench/frontend/scripts/generate-types.sh + CI drift check（仅含 /api/health 类型）。F002 在此基础上 (1) 触发新 /api/dashboard /api/strategies /api/backtests /api/reports /api/recommendations /api/snapshots /api/backlog 全部 endpoint schema 写入 OpenAPI；(2) generate-types.sh 跑后 src/types/api.ts 含所有新 schemas；(3) CI drift 自动失败若 backend schema 改而 types 未 regen；(4) 任意 frontend page 跨 fetch 必须 import types 而非 hardcoded interface。

features.title: Shell layout extend：TopBar + SideNav + dark theme tokens（在 B020/B021 既有 Footer 上加）
features.acceptance: B020+B021 已交付 components/shell/Footer + lib/disclaimer + middleware + /(protected)/ layout。F003 加 (1) components/shell/TopBar.tsx 含项目名 + snapshot indicator + nav links + user email/avatar (来自 useSession)；(2) components/shell/SideNav.tsx 含 7 page links + active state；(3) ThemeProvider + dark mode CSS variables；(4) (protected)/layout 包 TopBar + SideNav + Footer；(5) 安全 regression：所有 7 routes Playwright 覆盖含 disclaimer + TopBar + SideNav 链接可点开。B020 既有 5 个安全 guard 测试全部继续过。

features.title: Chart component library wrappers（lightweight-charts + ECharts）
features.acceptance: 新建 workbench/frontend/src/components/chart/{EquityCurveChart,DrawdownChart,SweepHeatmap,AllocationPie,AllocationBar}.tsx：(1) EquityCurveChart lightweight-charts area + 多 series overlay (legend 切换) + brush 选区 emit [startDate,endDate] callback + 十字光标 + PNG 导出（chart.takeScreenshot()）；(2) DrawdownChart lightweight-charts histogram 与 EquityCurveChart 共享 time axis；(3) SweepHeatmap ECharts heatmap；(4) AllocationPie + AllocationBar ECharts；(5) Vitest 单测：每组件 mock props 渲染 + assert DOM 基本存在 + PNG export emits blob (mocked)；(6) /dev/charts 路由（NEXT_PUBLIC_DEV_ROUTES gate）含全部组件示例数据，不可在 production shell 导航。

features.title: Table component AG Grid wrapper + CSV export + 列定义
features.acceptance: components/table/DataTable<T>.tsx：(1) AG Grid Community wrapper 默认 sortable + filterable + resizable + sticky header；(2) ref exposes exportCsv() 方法；(3) reusable 列定义 dateColumn / currencyColumn / percentColumn / basisPointsColumn / weightColumn 各有 formatter + right-align + tabular-nums；(4) Vitest 渲染 1000 行 mock 数据虚拟化（DOM ≤ ~30 行同时存在）；(5) CSV export 测试产 mock blob valid CSV；(6) snapshot 测试每列定义 formatting 稳定。

features.title: Home / Dashboard page vertical slice (auth-gated)
features.acceptance: Backend route GET /api/dashboard (require_authenticated_user) 返 {nav, masterDrawdown, killSwitchThreshold, daysToNextRebalance, lastRebalance:{date,fillCount,slippageBps}, recentReports:[{id,title,date,status,path}], actionItems:[{id,severity,message}]}。读 SQLite via Repository（不直读 file）。Frontend (protected)/page.tsx 替换现有 placeholder：4 top cards + recent reports list（链 /reports/[id]）+ action items + empty states。Fetch via same-origin /api/dashboard（per framework v0.9.24 #3）。Vitest mock API；Playwright smoke 加载 + 4 cards 可见；httpx TestClient schema 契约。

features.title: Strategies page vertical slice
features.acceptance: Backend GET /api/strategies + /api/strategies/{id}（auth gated）返 sleeve 列表 + per-strategy 详情含 provenance（spec / code / last sweep 链接）。Frontend (protected)/strategies/page.tsx：DataTable 列表 + per-strategy detail panel（config card + equity curve + drawdown + turnover heatmap + perf comparison）。可 ?selected=B013 URL param。strategy registry 从 trade/ 通过 backend adapter 暴露 4 sleeves with B019 默认（B013 quarterly/0.11，其它不变）。CSV export 工作；spec/code 链按钮经 /api/docs/{path} 后端服务（含 path traversal sanitization）。

features.title: Backtest viewer page vertical slice + ResizablePanel split
features.acceptance: Backend POST /api/backtests/run (auth) 同步跑 trade.master.run_backtest()；GET /api/backtests/{run_id} cache。Frontend (protected)/backtest/page.tsx **layout 用 shadcn <ResizablePanelGroup> single horizontal split**：左 = 选择器（strategy / snapshot / window + run button），右 = 结果（metrics card + EquityCurveChart + DrawdownChart + allocation history + trades AG Grid）。**硬边界：仅此页用 ResizablePanel；不引入 react-grid-layout；不持久化 panel size；不跨页同步；其它 6 页无 ResizablePanel（regression assert）。** Comparison toggle layer SPY + static 60/40。Playwright smoke 跑 canned B010 backtest on fixture snapshot < 5s；ResizablePanel 鼠标 + 键盘可拖（Radix 原生）。

features.title: Reports page vertical slice + markdown rendering
features.acceptance: Backend GET /api/reports + /api/reports/{slug}（auth）返 docs/test-reports/ markdown 列表 + 渲染后 structured JSON（tables 提取以便 frontend AG Grid 重渲）。Frontend (protected)/reports/page.tsx + reports/[id]/page.tsx：列表 + 详情页用 react-markdown + remark-gfm + custom code-block + table renderer（tables ≥ 10 行用 AG Grid）。Cross-links docs/specs/B0*.md + docs/test-reports/B0*.md 解析为内部 route。新增 /api/docs/{path} backend 共享路径解析 endpoint（sanitize traversal）。B017/B018/B019 reports 全部能干净渲染；B019 retune sweep matrix 可交互排序；smoke 测试加载 B019 报告确认 matrix 表存在。

features.title: Recommendations page vertical slice + export markdown ticket
features.acceptance: Backend GET /api/recommendations/current（auth）：从 SQLite via Repository 读 accounts/me.json 数据 + 最新 snapshot + master portfolio config → 跑 master 在最新 signal date → 返 TargetPositions + diff vs current + gate checks + wash-sale flags（启发式：journal 30 天内同 symbol 买入）。POST /api/recommendations/export-ticket 写 markdown checklist 到 docs/runs/<date>/order-ticket-<date>.md 返路径；**绝不下任何单**。Frontend (protected)/recommendations/page.tsx：AllocationPie + AllocationBar + positions table + rationale + gate panel + wash-sale flags + Export Markdown Ticket 按钮。Empty state if accounts/me.json 缺。Unit test 断言 export ticket 含字面字符串 'research-only; this is a manual review checklist, not a trading instruction'。

features.title: Snapshots page vertical slice + refresh with SSE progress
features.acceptance: Backend GET /api/snapshots（auth）从 SnapshotMeta repo 读列表 + quality status；POST /api/snapshots/refresh 跑 scripts/refresh_public_snapshot subprocess 经 SSE 流式 progress；完成后 insert SnapshotMeta row 同时 file 写盘。Frontend (protected)/snapshots/page.tsx：DataTable + Refresh 按钮触发 modal 流 SSE events；完成 list re-fetch + toast 成功/失败。Vitest mock subprocess (2-second canned)；SSE events 渲染。失败 toast 含底层 error message。

features.title: Backlog page vertical slice + CRUD + auto-commit
features.acceptance: Backend GET/POST/PATCH/DELETE /api/backlog（auth）经 BacklogEntry repo 持久化；mutation 后自动 `git add backlog.json && git commit -m 'chore(backlog): <action>'`（commit author = workbench；user 可后续 amend）。Frontend (protected)/backlog/page.tsx：DataTable + priority filter + Add/Edit/Delete actions（Dialog modals + form validation）。验收：(1) list 加载现 4 entries 反映 BL-B011-S2 high；(2) create/edit/delete e2e 工作；(3) 每 mutation 产生 git commit；(4) commit message 匹配 `chore(backlog): add|edit|delete BL-<id>`；(5) git error (conflict 等) → mutation fail closed + toast 显示底层错误。

features.title: Workbench docs + screenshots + runbook + branch protection 指引刷新
features.acceptance: workbench/README.md 刷新含 prereq (Python 3.11+ + Node 20+) + 一键 boot (scripts/start_workbench.sh) + dev/build/test 命令 + troubleshooting (端口冲突 / snapshot refresh / type drift) + production URL trade.guangai.ai。新增 7 页截图（PNG ≤ 300 KB each）放 docs/screenshots/。docs/dev/workbench-architecture.md 更新含 7 页架构图 + 请求生命周期 + cloud deploy 流 + 安全 guard。CLAUDE.md reference-docs 段刷新指向新文档。docs/dev/branch-protection-guidance.md 加上 workbench-deploy.yml workflow 入 required status check 候选。

features.title: Codex L1 + L2 真 VM 验收 + workbench signoff
features.acceptance: L1 (CI 内)：npm test + pytest + ruff + mypy backend 全清；frontend lint+typecheck+build+vitest 全清；Playwright E2E smoke walks 全 7 routes + 断言 disclaimer 可见 + 无 console errors；安全 regression 测试全过（含 NEXT_PUBLIC_/localhost build artifact regression 守 v0.9.24 #3）。L2 (真 VM trade.guangai.ai 浏览器)：(1) 7 页 OAuth gating 工作；(2) Home dashboard 显示真实 NAV/DD/recent reports；(3) Strategies 浏览 4 sleeves + 历史曲线；(4) Backtest viewer ResizablePanel split + 跑 B013 backtest 出图；(5) Reports 渲染 B019 retune sweep 表 + 跨链接到 spec；(6) Recommendations 用 fixture accounts/me.json 产 target portfolio + export markdown ticket；(7) Snapshots refresh 经 SSE；(8) Backlog CRUD + git commit；(9) /api/health 仍返 6 字段；(10) 邻居服务 (nginx+pm2 aigcgateway+apify-kol) 完全不受影响。Codex 写 docs/test-reports/B022-workbench-phase1-signoff-2026-MM-DD.md 用 framework/templates/signoff-report.md。更新 progress.json status→done / docs.signoff 设值 / evaluator_feedback 含 10 项验收概要。
